class.name: GDKSocialUser
class.brief_description: A tracked user in the Xbox Social Manager graph.
class.description: Contains social profile data for a user being tracked through the Social Manager. Retrieved from [code]GDK.social.get_group_users()[/code].

method.name: is_favorite
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is a favorite of the local user.

method.name: is_friend
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user is a friend of the local user.

method.name: is_following_user
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the local user is following this user.

method.name: is_followed_by_caller
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if this user is followed by the calling user.

method.name: get_real_name
method.description: Returns the user's real name, if available.

method.name: get_display_picture_url
method.description: Returns the URL of the user's display picture.

method.name: uses_avatar
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the user uses an avatar for their display picture.

method.name: get_gamerscore
method.description: Returns the user's gamerscore as a string.

method.name: get_modern_gamertag_suffix
method.description: Returns the numeric suffix of the user's modern gamertag.

method.name: get_unique_modern_gamertag
method.description: Returns the user's unique modern gamertag including suffix.

method.name: get_title_history
method.description: Returns the user's title history as a dictionary.

method.name: get_preferred_color
method.description: Returns the user's preferred color as a dictionary.

members.member: Whether the user is a favorite of the local user.
Whether the user is a friend of the local user.
The user's real name, if available.
The URL of the user's display picture.
